scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,cf,us,cg -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:sense" "npm run dev:guide"
scripts.data:fetch: bash scripts/run-conda.sh bash -c 'cd services/cityforesight && python scripts/fetch_data.py'
scripts.train:baseline: bash scripts/run-conda.sh bash -c 'cd services/cityforesight && python training/train_baseline.py'
scripts.train:kil: bash scripts/run-conda.sh bash -c 'cd services/cityforesight && python training/train_kil.py'
scripts.eval: bash scripts/run-conda.sh bash -c 'cd services/cityforesight && python training/evaluate.py'
scripts.train:all: npm run train:baseline && npm run train:kil && npm run eval
scripts.ontology:build: bash scripts/run-conda.sh bash -c 'cd services/urbansense && python scripts/build_ontology.py'
scripts.eval:sense: bash scripts/run-conda.sh bash -c 'cd services/urbansense && python scripts/evaluate_anomalies.py'
